expectations.evidence: Opens with 'Let's start broad...' then Q1 asks about the broad context ('What was happening right before this idea occurred to you?') before Q2 narrows to 'Walk me through the last specific time this problem bit you'.
expectations.text: The answer opens with broad questions before narrowing to specifics.

expectations.evidence: 'Walk me through the last specific time this problem bit you or someone on your team — what were you trying to do, and what got in the way?' directly targets the pain/trigger.
expectations.text: At least one question targets the underlying pain or what triggered the idea.

expectations.evidence: Numbered 1-3 progression plus 'once I see what's actually underneath, I'll know what to ask next' signals a staged follow-up rather than a full dump.
expectations.text: The questions set a path or sequence rather than dumping everything at once.
